title: Variables, Identifiers & Types
source_outline: Variables and assignment: the assignment operator (=); reassignment and updating values
Identifiers - naming rules and conventions: legal identifier characters; snake_case convention; reserved keywords; case sensitivity
Values and types: int, float, str, bool
Inspecting types: the type() function; dynamic typing (concept)

next_assessment.title: Python Core Skills Checkpoint
next_assessment.outcome: The learner can translate a plain-English problem into correct, tested Python using variables, control flow, and functions.
